---
name: RFC
about: Request for comment on a significant change
title: "[rfc] "
labels: ["rfc"]
assignees: []
---

## Motivation

What problem does this solve, and why now? Link to relevant issues, prior art, or discussion.

## Proposal

The change you are proposing. Be specific. Include API shapes, schemas, or interaction sketches if applicable.

## Alternatives

Other approaches you considered and why you did not pick them.

## Open questions

Things you are unsure about and want feedback on.

## Success criteria

How will we know this RFC has done what it set out to do? List measurable or observable outcomes.

## Impact

- Backward compatibility:
- Affected packages:
- Affected neurotypes (if any):
- Migration path (if needed):
